name: trustbutverify
description: Browser extension to track copy activities on LLM/Gen AI websites

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: mv dist/src/popup/popup.html dist/popup/ 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf dist/src && sed -i 's|src="/popup/popup.js"|src="./popup.js"|g' dist/popup/popup.html && sed -i 's|href="/popup/popup.css"|href="./popup.css"|g' dist/popup/popup.html
